topic_context.topic_summary: This topic contains rules that automate smart-home devices based on presence detection or specific events, such as turning lights on or off when someone is detected or when a user leaves a designated area.

rows.if_then_rule: IF You enter an area from Location THEN Resume programmed schedule using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort.
IF You enter an area from Location THEN Resume normal programmed schedule using Honeywell Total Connect Comfort.
IF Motion has been detected from Netatmo Security THEN Turn on using D-Link Smart Plug.
IF Someone unknown has been seen from Netatmo Security THEN Turn on using D-Link Smart Plug.
IF tado° switches to Home Mode from tado Air Conditioning THEN Turn lights on using LIFX.
IF New motion event from Nest Cam THEN Turn light on using Emberlight.
IF Every day at from Date & Time THEN Set the thermostat to schedule using Hive Active Heating.
IF Every day at from Date & Time THEN Lock using SmartThings.
IF Every day of the week at from Date & Time THEN Lock using SmartThings.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN Turn off using WeMo Light Switch.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN Turn on lights using Philips Hue.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN Turn on lights using Philips Hue.
IF Smart Home/Away from ecobee THEN Turn on lights using Philips Hue.
